_comment_1: Copy this file to credentials.json and replace BOTH api_key and base_url
_comment_2: REQUIRED: api_key - Get from YOUR_BASE_URL/admin -> API Keys (READ + MANAGE permissions)
_comment_3: REQUIRED: base_url - Full URL to your Cortex Library instance (e.g., https://library.example.com)
_comment_4: collection_id is auto-populated on first sync
